prompt:
Goal: Create a cinematic vertical fantasy movie poster for Sun Wukong, inspired by Journey to the West, showing the Monkey King charging out of the frame with overwhelming heroic motion.

Canvas: Vertical 3:4 poster, ultra-detailed, high-contrast, epic Chinese mythological fantasy, warm golden storm light, dark mountain valley, volumetric clouds, dust, sparks, magical energy trails, dramatic depth of field.

Main subject: One central full-body 3D character, Sun Wukong, leaping toward the viewer from a rocky mountain path. He wears ornate red-and-gold battle armor with engraved shoulder plates, layered scale skirt armor, red cloth ribbons, tiger-fur waist accents, decorated bracers and boots. His golden-brown monkey hair rises upward like a flaming mane. His face is covered by a centered opaque brown square censor block. His right arm thrusts a huge golden staff directly toward the camera, making the staff extremely foreshortened and breaking the poster frame; the staff dominates the left foreground and is motion-blurred at the tip. His left arm extends backward for balance, with red scarf fabric whipping in the wind.

Environment: A vast mythic mountain landscape with jagged cliffs on both sides, a winding rocky path below, distant temples and pavilions built on peaks, storm clouds split by heavenly sunlight, flying debris, mist, and radiant golden spell lines connecting scenes across the poster.

Background story vignettes: Include exactly 4 small narrative scenes around the main figure: 1) upper left, a distant sacred mountain temple on a cliff; 2) upper right, a floating celestial palace scene with two flying immortal figures inside a glowing rectangular magical frame; 3) lower left, a monk-like Tang Sanzang figure standing on the path among mist and followers; 4) mid-to-lower right, a small warrior or pilgrim figure walking through the mountain trail near glowing spell lines.

Chinese poster text: Add exactly 6 vertical or calligraphic text groups in gold. Preserve these visible Chinese titles: 1) large bottom-left brush calligraphy title 「孙悟空」; 2) upper-left vertical label 「花果山」; 3) upper-right vertical label 「大闹天宫」; 4) mid-right vertical label 「五行山下」; 5) lower-right vertical label 「降妖除魔」; 6) lower-left vertical label 「西天取经」. Add tiny supporting Chinese subtext beside each label, but keep it decorative and secondary. Include a small red seal stamp near the large title and a small tagline at the bottom reading 「齐天大圣·斗战之心」.

Composition: The staff must protrude aggressively from the center-left foreground toward the viewer; the main body should fill the middle of the poster; the four background vignettes should remain smaller and atmospheric. Use golden linework and faint geometric frames to guide the eye around the poster.

Style: Hyper-realistic 3D render mixed with Chinese fantasy concept art, ornate armor detail, cinematic lighting, IMAX poster scale, dynamic action, dust clouds, glowing particles, dramatic clouds, sharp central character, soft atmospheric background.

Constraints: No modern objects, no English text on the poster, no extra main characters, no logos or watermarks. Keep the face-obscuring brown square visible exactly over the central character's face.
